commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'for n in ip-10-1-12-160.us-east-2.compute.internal ip-10-1-12-221.us-east-2.compute.internal; do echo "=== $n ==="; kubectl --context ohio describe node $n | grep -E "nvidia.com/gpu|vpc.amazonaws.com/efa|Allocatable|Capacity|hugepages|cpu:|memory:|efa-bolt" | head -20; done'
